title: indie Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Results
text: indie Semiconductor reported fourth quarter 2025 results with revenue of $54.9 million, down from Q3 2025. The company reported a GAAP operating loss of $35.2 million and a non-GAAP operating loss of $11.3 million. Net loss per share on a GAAP basis was $0.16, while non-GAAP loss per share was $0.05. For full year 2025, indie reported revenue of $217.4 million, essentially flat compared to 2024. The company ended 2025 with cash of $201.4 million. For Q1 2026, the company guides revenue of $52-58 million with a midpoint of $55 million. Gross margins are expected to remain strong at approximately 50%. The company highlighted continued design win momentum across ADAS radar, vision, and LiDAR products. Multiple new products are expected to launch throughout 2026 including SiC power modules, connectivity ICs, and next-generation photonics solutions.
